concept: Wide / Of Great Breadth / Extending Far
description: Of great or more than average width; extending far from side to side. 'Losha' names the quality of breadth—horizontal extension, spaciousness across.
sound_symbolism: The word spreads outward. 'Lo' flows horizontally, extension beginning. Then 'shao' /ʃa/ breathes into space, width achieved.
grammatical_notes: Functions as an adjective: 'losha mira' (wide river). Opposite of 'hieru' (narrow). Related to 'nulo' (deep) as another spatial dimension.

pillars.art-nouveau-aesthetics: Wide forms created flow—expansive designs that guided the eye across surfaces.
pillars.solarpunk-values: Wide perspectives see interconnection—breadth of vision recognizes how systems connect.
